trajectories.name: Proof-First Path
trajectories.description: The healthier path is to convert pressure into a visible artifact instead of more planning smoke.
supporting_signals: Lumen Sketch is a fictional creative tool about turning mood boards into small visual posters.
The proof moment is one export that feels worth saving without apologizing for it. Source: [[90 Sources/Captures/2026-05-21-demo-answer]].
Mira likes warm interfaces with visible craft, specific motion, and emotional texture.
Mira rejects generic dashboard polish when it has no real point of view.
Mira keeps returning to warm, slow, dramatic, replayable music while shaping visual tools.
The music reference is not decoration; it describes pacing, emotional temperature, and motion feel.
trajectories.suggested_next_move: Pick one artifact receipt that would make the next week feel real.

trajectories.name: Taste-Protected Path
trajectories.description: The graph already knows some anti-taste; use it as a guardrail before shipping.
supporting_signals: Mira notices the body difference between alive creative work and dead fake-polish work.
The note exists to test intimate export filtering and relationship graph semantics.
River noticed that Mira looked alive while tuning export motion and drained while writing fake onboarding copy.
Taste guardrail: warm, specific, useful, emotional, and never generic dashboard sludge.
Mira rejects generic dashboard polish when it has no real point of view.
The anti-pattern is fake onboarding copy trying to explain what the tool should have made obvious.
trajectories.suggested_next_move: Run `taste-autopilot` on the next artifact draft.
